{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Maintenance Expert",
  "description": "VIJU Industries Nigeria Limited is a leading player in Nigeria&rsquo;s food and beverage sector, recognized for its dedication to quality, innovation, and consumer satisfaction. Since its establishment, the company has built a strong reputation by producing nutritious and affordable products that have become household staples across the country.

Its flagship offerings include Viju Milk Drink, Viju BB Star, and a wide variety of flavored yoghurts, fruit milk drinks, and refreshing beverages. The company also produces Mr. V Premium Water and V-Cool Soft Drinks, ensuring a diverse portfolio that caters to different tastes and age groups. Each product is crafted to meet international standards while remaining accessible to Nigerian families.

Guided by values of innovation, quality assurance, accessibility, and sustainability, VIJU Industries continues to expand its product lines and distribution network. Its commitment to excellence has made it a trusted brand not only in Nigeria but also across West Africa. More than a manufacturer, VIJU Industries is a symbol of nourishment and reliability, enriching lives with products that inspire joy, promote well-being, and reflect the company&rsquo;s vision of making nutrition enjoyable and affordable for all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Maintenance Expert
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

&nbsp;Responsibilities&nbsp;


	The position is primarily responsible for the maintenance and repair of all mechanical equipment involved in the production and operation of a beverage company, ensuring the safe and stable operation of the production line.
	Applicants must be able to independently carry out equipment inspections, parts replacement, troubleshooting, and repairs.
	Familiarity with mechanical structures and related standards is required, along with solid technical skills and extensive practical experience.


Requirements


	One professional mechanical maintenance worker with more than five years of relevant work experience.


Salary
N300,000 - N600,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;vijutalent@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-04",

  },

Maintenance Expert Job at Viju Industries Limited




        
    

        
        VIJU Industries Nigeria Limited is a leading player in Nigeria’s food and beverage sector, recognized for its dedication to quality, innovation, and consumer satisfaction. Since its establishment, the company has built a strong reputation by producing nutritious and affordable products that have become household staples across the country.

Its flagship offerings include Viju Milk Drink, Viju BB Star, and a wide variety of flavored yoghurts, fruit milk drinks, and refreshing beverages. The company also produces Mr. V Premium Water and V-Cool Soft Drinks, ensuring a diverse portfolio that caters to different tastes and age groups. Each product is crafted to meet international standards while remaining accessible to Nigerian families.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Guided by values of innovation, quality assurance, accessibility, and sustainability, VIJU Industries continues to expand its product lines and distribution network. Its commitment to excellence has made it a trusted brand not only in Nigeria but also across West Africa. More than a manufacturer, VIJU Industries is a symbol of nourishment and reliability, enriching lives with products that inspire joy, promote well-being, and reflect the company’s vision of making nutrition enjoyable and affordable for all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Maintenance Expert
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

 Responsibilities 


	The position is primarily responsible for the maintenance and repair of all mechanical equipment involved in the production and operation of a beverage company, ensuring the safe and stable operation of the production line.
	Applicants must be able to independently carry out equipment inspections, parts replacement, troubleshooting, and repairs.
	Familiarity with mechanical structures and related standards is required, along with solid technical skills and extensive practical experience.


Requirements


	One professional mechanical maintenance worker with more than five years of relevant work experience.


Salary
N300,000 - N600,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Human Resource Manager (Female)",
  "description": "Virgin Beauty Industries Limited is a leading company in the beauty industry in Nigeria. We offer exceptional products for hair and skin solutions. Our goal is to meet customers beauty needs and keep their hair nourished with our organically sourced materials.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Human Resource Manager (Female)

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Implementing and revising a company&rsquo;s compensation program
	Creating and revising job descriptions
	Conducting annual salary surveys
	Developing, analyzing, and updating the company&rsquo;s salary budget
	Developing, analyzing and updating the company&rsquo;s evaluation program
	Developing, revising, and recommending personnel policies and procedures
	Maintaining and revising the company&rsquo;s handbook on policies and procedures
	Performing benefits administration
	Maintaining affirmative action programs
	Overseeing recruitment efforts for all personnel, including writing and placing job ads
	Conducting new employee orientations and employee relations counseling
	Overseeing exit interviews
	Maintaining department records and reports
	Participating in administrative staff meetings
	Maintaining company directory and other organizational charts
	Recommending new policies, approaches, and procedures.


Qualification


	B.Sc. / HND in Human Resources or relevant fields.


Experience:


	3 - 5 years of experience in relevant roles.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to:&nbsp;virginbeauty359@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Only qualified candidates will be considered.",

Human Resource Manager (Female) Job at Virgin Beauty Industries Limited




        
    

        
        Virgin Beauty Industries Limited is a leading company in the beauty industry in Nigeria. We offer exceptional products for hair and skin solutions. Our goal is to meet customers beauty needs and keep their hair nourished with our organically sourced materials.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resource Manager (Female)

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Implementing and revising a company’s compensation program
	Creating and revising job descriptions
	Conducting annual salary surveys
	Developing, analyzing, and updating the company’s salary budget
	Developing, analyzing and updating the company’s evaluation program
	Developing, revising, and recommending personnel policies and procedures
	Maintaining and revising the company’s handbook on policies and procedures
	Performing benefits administration
	Maintaining affirmative action programs
	Overseeing recruitment efforts for all personnel, including writing and placing job ads
	Conducting new employee orientations and employee relations counseling
	Overseeing exit interviews
	Maintaining department records and reports
	Participating in administrative staff meetings
	Maintaining company directory and other organizational charts
	Recommending new policies, approaches, and procedures.


Qualification


	B.Sc. / HND in Human Resources or relevant fields.


Experience:


	3 - 5 years of experience in relevant roles.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only qualified candidates will be considered.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Enterprise Sales Business Development Manager",
  "description": "Prolato Technologies Limited is an indigenous ICT company with a clear and dedicated focus on ICT ICT Infrastructure, IT Security, support and professional services delivery. We are visionary and a reliable IT partner filling in the gaps in the IT sector. We accomplish this by analyzing each business&rsquo;s needs, ensuring that every project delivers the right solutions to meet strategic business targets.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Enterprise Sales Business Development Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Surulere,&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Develop annual sales strategy and business plan to drive business growth and the achievement of set goals including increasing sales, market share and profitability; cascade it down to quarterly and monthly sales operations plan
	Establish close business relationships with the clients&rsquo; and act as a contract negotiator in transaction
	Develop integrated marketing strategies, product pricing and sales plans
	Lead market research, market analysis and competitive analysis in order to identify threats and opportunities and develop marketing plan and activities accordingly.
	Develop the sales and marketing division&rsquo;s budget in collaboration with finance
	Keep abreast of economic, industry, market and regulatory trends, ascertain their (potential) impact on the business and advice management, accordingly, develop complementary strategies or initiatives to strengthen the company&rsquo;s market share position
	Develop strategies to expand the customer base and contribute to the development of the company&rsquo;s brand.
	Source and manage relationships with and evaluate the effectiveness of outsourced providers of marketing services.
	Lead negotiation for business deals; negotiate supply agreements.


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND in relevant disciplines
	&nbsp;3- 5 years&rsquo; experience in enterprise IT sales is a must.
	Knowledge of selling enterprise solutions and/or infrastructureis&nbsp; a must
	Expertise in Sales, Sales Presentations, and Lead Generation
	Experience in Account Management and Sales Operations
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Experience in OEM products, IT solutions, Software, Digital solutions is a must.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@prolatotech.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.",

Enterprise Sales Business Development Manager Job at Prolato Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Prolato Technologies Limited is an indigenous ICT company with a clear and dedicated focus on ICT ICT Infrastructure, IT Security, support and professional services delivery. We are visionary and a reliable IT partner filling in the gaps in the IT sector. We accomplish this by analyzing each business’s needs, ensuring that every project delivers the right solutions to meet strategic business targets.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Enterprise Sales Business Development Manager

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop annual sales strategy and business plan to drive business growth and the achievement of set goals including increasing sales, market share and profitability; cascade it down to quarterly and monthly sales operations plan
	Establish close business relationships with the clients’ and act as a contract negotiator in transaction
	Develop integrated marketing strategies, product pricing and sales plans
	Lead market research, market analysis and competitive analysis in order to identify threats and opportunities and develop marketing plan and activities accordingly.
	Develop the sales and marketing division’s budget in collaboration with finance
	Keep abreast of economic, industry, market and regulatory trends, ascertain their (potential) impact on the business and advice management, accordingly, develop complementary strategies or initiatives to strengthen the company’s market share position
	Develop strategies to expand the customer base and contribute to the development of the company’s brand.
	Source and manage relationships with and evaluate the effectiveness of outsourced providers of marketing services.
	Lead negotiation for business deals; negotiate supply agreements.


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND in relevant disciplines
	 3- 5 years’ experience in enterprise IT sales is a must.
	Knowledge of selling enterprise solutions and/or infrastructureis  a must
	Expertise in Sales, Sales Presentations, and Lead Generation
	Experience in Account Management and Sales Operations
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Experience in OEM products, IT solutions, Software, Digital solutions is a must.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Fulfillment Officer",
  "description": "Mopheth Nigeria Limited is an organization charged with the goal of meeting the diverse needs of its growing customers from all walks of life. We began as a community Pharmacy in the year 1997, and through the years we have maintained our standard of being a renowned name in the Pharmaceutical industry in Nigeria. However, with respect to our vision consumables, cosmetics and skincare products, safe water production, grocery essentials, and a variety of baked goods. In addition, our 24 hours availability onsite and online in all our branches have equally ensured our clients can rely on us for immediate service at any hour of the day.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fulfillment Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki / Victoria Island (VI)&nbsp;- Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Shift-Based (Monday &ndash; Saturday)

Job Summary


	We are seeking smart, detail-oriented Fulfillment Officers responsible for accurate packaging, sealing, and handover of orders to dispatch riders. The ideal candidate must have prior experience in fulfillment, logistics, or retail operations, ensuring orders are prepared correctly and efficiently for delivery.


Key Responsibilities


	Pick, pack, and properly seal customer orders for dispatch
	Ensure all items are accurate, complete, and in good condition before handover
	Label packages correctly and prepare them for easy identification and delivery
	Coordinate with dispatch riders for timely pickup of orders
	Maintain a clean and organized packing area
	Monitor and report damaged, missing, or incorrect items
	Ensure adherence to company packaging and quality standards
	Support inventory checks related to outgoing orders


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Order Accuracy Rate (error-free packaging)
	Speed of Fulfillment (timely order preparation)
	Dispatch Efficiency (on-time rider handover)
	Damage/Error Reduction Rate
	Workspace Organization &amp; Cleanliness


Requirements


	Minimum of OND/HND in any relevant field
	Proven experience in fulfillment, dispatch, logistics, or retail store operations
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy in handling orders
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, shift-based environment
	Good organizational and time management skills
	Physically fit and able to handle packaging tasks
	Must be smart, proactive, and reliable.


Salary
Competitive

Method of Appliation&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to&nbsp;hrmopheth@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Fulfillment Officer &ndash; VI/Lekki&quot; as the subject of the mail.&nbsp;",

  },

Fulfillment Officer Job at Mopheth Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Mopheth Nigeria Limited is an organization charged with the goal of meeting the diverse needs of its growing customers from all walks of life. We began as a community Pharmacy in the year 1997, and through the years we have maintained our standard of being a renowned name in the Pharmaceutical industry in Nigeria. However, with respect to our vision consumables, cosmetics and skincare products, safe water production, grocery essentials, and a variety of baked goods. In addition, our 24 hours availability onsite and online in all our branches have equally ensured our clients can rely on us for immediate service at any hour of the day.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fulfillment Officer
Job Location: Lekki / Victoria Island (VI) - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Shift-Based (Monday – Saturday)

Job Summary


	We are seeking smart, detail-oriented Fulfillment Officers responsible for accurate packaging, sealing, and handover of orders to dispatch riders. The ideal candidate must have prior experience in fulfillment, logistics, or retail operations, ensuring orders are prepared correctly and efficiently for delivery.


Key Responsibilities


	Pick, pack, and properly seal customer orders for dispatch
	Ensure all items are accurate, complete, and in good condition before handover
	Label packages correctly and prepare them for easy identification and delivery
	Coordinate with dispatch riders for timely pickup of orders
	Maintain a clean and organized packing area
	Monitor and report damaged, missing, or incorrect items
	Ensure adherence to company packaging and quality standards
	Support inventory checks related to outgoing orders


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Order Accuracy Rate (error-free packaging)
	Speed of Fulfillment (timely order preparation)
	Dispatch Efficiency (on-time rider handover)
	Damage/Error Reduction Rate
	Workspace Organization & Cleanliness


Requirements


	Minimum of OND/HND in any relevant field
	Proven experience in fulfillment, dispatch, logistics, or retail store operations
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy in handling orders
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, shift-based environment
	Good organizational and time management skills
	Physically fit and able to handle packaging tasks
	Must be smart, proactive, and reliable.


Salary
Competitive

Method of Appliation 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to [email protected] using "Fulfillment Officer – VI/Lekki" as the subject of the mail.     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative Officer",
  "description": "Applicant Recruiters Limited - We are a growing business specializing in FMCG. We are committed to providing top-notch products and exceptional customer service.

As part of our expansion, we&nbsp;are recruiting an energetic and motivated individual to join our team in the capacity below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Shagamu, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for an energetic and motivated individual to join our team as an Administrative Officer.
	Supports the daily administrative operations of the organization.
	Handling office tasks, maintaining records, coordinating communication, assisting in ensuring smooth office operations


Requirements


	Education : ND / HND in Business Administration, Office Management or Related field
	Experince : 2-3 years
	Skill: Basic knowledge of office equipment and administrative procedures. Provide general administrative assistance to managers and staff.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint). Good written and verbal communication skills.
	Person Spec: Professional attitude. Confidentiality and integrity. Teamwork and problem-solving ability Ability to multitask.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;recruitment@otsuka.ng&nbsp;and&nbsp;applicantrecruiters@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Administrative Officer Job at Applicant Recruiters Limited




        
    

        
        Applicant Recruiters Limited - We are a growing business specializing in FMCG. We are committed to providing top-notch products and exceptional customer service.

As part of our expansion, we are recruiting an energetic and motivated individual to join our team in the capacity below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location: Shagamu, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for an energetic and motivated individual to join our team as an Administrative Officer.
	Supports the daily administrative operations of the organization.
	Handling office tasks, maintaining records, coordinating communication, assisting in ensuring smooth office operations


Requirements


	Education : ND / HND in Business Administration, Office Management or Related field
	Experince : 2-3 years
	Skill: Basic knowledge of office equipment and administrative procedures. Provide general administrative assistance to managers and staff.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint). Good written and verbal communication skills.
	Person Spec: Professional attitude. Confidentiality and integrity. Teamwork and problem-solving ability Ability to multitask.


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] and [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
